# clerk_saml_connection (Resource)

Manages a Clerk SAML connection for SSO authentication (e.g. Microsoft Entra ID).



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `domain` (String) Domain for the SAML connection (e.g. "aretecp.com").
- `name` (String) Display name of the SAML connection (e.g. "Microsoft Entra ID").
- `saml_provider` (String) SAML provider type (e.g. "saml_microsoft", "saml_custom"). Cannot be changed after creation.

### Optional

- `active` (Boolean) Whether the SAML connection is active.
- `allow_idp_initiated` (Boolean) Whether to allow IdP-initiated SSO flows.
- `allow_subdomains` (Boolean) Whether to allow subdomains of the configured domain.
- `attribute_mapping` (Attributes) SAML attribute mapping configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--attribute_mapping))
- `disable_additional_identifications` (Boolean) Whether to disable additional identification methods for SAML users.
- `idp_certificate` (String, Sensitive) Identity Provider X.509 certificate.
- `idp_entity_id` (String) Identity Provider Entity ID.
- `idp_metadata` (String) Raw Identity Provider SAML metadata XML.
- `idp_metadata_url` (String) Identity Provider federation metadata URL for auto-configuration.
- `idp_sso_url` (String) Identity Provider Single Sign-On URL.
- `organization_id` (String) Clerk organization ID to associate with this SAML connection.
- `sync_user_attributes` (Boolean) Whether to sync user attributes from the IdP on each sign-in.

### Read-Only

- `acs_url` (String) Assertion Consumer Service URL. Configure this in your Identity Provider.
- `created_at` (String) Timestamp when the SAML connection was created.
- `id` (String) Unique identifier of the SAML connection.
- `sp_entity_id` (String) Service Provider Entity ID. Configure this in your Identity Provider.
- `sp_metadata_url` (String) Service Provider metadata URL.
- `updated_at` (String) Timestamp when the SAML connection was last updated.
- `user_count` (Number) Number of users associated with this SAML connection.

<a id="nestedatt--attribute_mapping"></a>
### Nested Schema for `attribute_mapping`

Optional:

- `email_address` (String) SAML attribute for email address.
- `first_name` (String) SAML attribute for first name.
- `last_name` (String) SAML attribute for last name.
- `user_id` (String) SAML attribute for user ID.
